redirect-target-b fixture

The landing page after redirect-origin-a.html's cross-origin JS redirect (design doc §5 arrival-check proof, M3 battery item c). If a chained command queued behind the `go` that led here ever executes on THIS page, the arrival check failed to halt the queue - that would be a real security regression (a redirect, or an open-redirect URL, silently running the user's next typed command on a page they never asked to land on).

a link (should never be extracted by a queued `extract links` if the arrival check is working)
